facebook.caption: Not every great spot in Phu Quoc is on the beach. Suoi Tranh Waterfall is one of the island's most refreshing natural escapes, tucked into the jungle along TL47 in Suối Mây. A short walk through shaded forest trails brings you to a series of cascading falls and clear natural pools perfect for cooling off. With over 500 reviews averaging 4 out of 5 stars, it's a well-loved stop for good reason. Go in the morning to beat the heat and the crowds, and wear shoes you don't mind getting wet.

instagram.caption: Jungle, fresh air, and a waterfall waiting at the end of the trail. Suoi Tranh Waterfall is your excuse to step away from the beach for a morning and explore Phu Quoc's greener side. Wear grippy shoes and go early for the best experience.

tiktok.caption: The waterfall side of Phu Quoc hits different. Suoi Tranh is a must-visit. #PhuQuoc #SuoiTranhWaterfall #VietnamTravel #HiddenGem

scenes: A jungle trail leads the way
Cool pools, fresh air, pure bliss
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip
